title: Compilation error on interface class usage

features.name: interface class with pure virtual function
features.description: Code should include an interface class declaration with a pure virtual function method

features.name: class implementing interface class
features.description: Code should include a class that implements an interface class with a virtual function

features.name: class extending base and implementing interface
features.description: Code should include a class that extends a base class and also implements an interface class

features.name: function with interface class type parameter
features.description: Code should include a function that takes an interface class type as a parameter

features.name: passing class extending base to interface parameter
features.description: Code should include passing a class instance that extends a base class and implements an interface to a function expecting the interface type
